name: Sophia
research_note: Single primary source kingshot-data. Gen 6 kingshotwiki 404 pattern. | 9x3x3 update: 2nd source added from lootbar.gg/blog/en/kingshot-gen-6-heroes-list-and-ranking.html — kingshot-data + lootbar.gg Gen 5/6 guide convergence confirmed on mechanics and max values (tier-by-tier scaling remains kingshot-data single-source for some fields).

conquest.name: Puppet Master
conquest.description: Deals AOE damage and confuses the target for 1 second. Confused enemies attack all surrounding targets, friend and foe.

conquest.name: Scalding Mark
conquest.description: Deals damage and applies Scalding Mark, increasing damage taken by the target for 4 seconds.

conquest.name: Scalding Mark - Lash
conquest.description: Boosts Sophia's Attack and allows a Lash attack against afflicted targets dealing increased damage.

expedition.name: Arcane Pact
expedition.description: Chance per turn to reduce damage taken by 50%.

expedition.name: Terror - Deathblow
expedition.description: Inflicts Terror status, causing increased damage from Cavalry to the target.

expedition.name: Terror - Annihilation
expedition.description: All squads deal increased damage to Terrified targets.

exclusive_gear_skills.name: Eyes of Obedience
exclusive_gear_skills.description: Chance of confusing the target for 1 second. Unlocked only when Scarlet Rose is equipped.

exclusive_gear_skills.name: Queen of Night
exclusive_gear_skills.description: Increases the Lethality of defender troops. Unlocked only when Scarlet Rose is equipped.

order: Primary Expedition amp (universal damage/formation boost) first
Cavalry support skills (pairs with Triton for 60/40 formations)

gear_recommendations.reasoning: Standard cavalry archetype at legendary tier. Derived from community gear build templates (allclash.com Zoe guide as canonical base for infantry, confirmed by community consensus across allclash, heaven-guardian, kingshothandbook build guides).
sources: allclash.com Zoe build guide (canonical infantry template)

named_pairs.note: Sophia + Triton pair for 60/40 formation meta

best_partners.theoretical_synergy: Sophia is a debuffer — her Scalding Mark + Terror skills set up enemies to take massive bonus damage from Cavalry rallies. Pairs naturally with Thrud (Cavalry multiplier) and Petra (cavalry rally lead) for an all-cavalry composition.
best_partners.source: kingshothandbook.com effect_op stacking math + community lineup guides

counters.reason: No public source documents explicit hero-vs-hero counter matchups for Kingshot. Community discussions reference troop-type rock-paper-scissors (Infantry > Cavalry > Archer > Infantry) and formation-based counters but not specific hero counters. Check Discord/Reddit for player-tested matchups.

f2p_investment.reasoning: heroes.js f2p=false. 2 access methods but premium investment tier.

rally.reasoning: Cavalry debuffer rally lead with strong damage amplification.

garrison.reasoning: Strong garrison with Arcane Pact damage reduction.

lore_background.title: The Queen of Night
lore_background.derived_character_themes: Rose-magic enchantress with themes of loyalty, confusion, and fear. Skill flavor text references "Loyalty to our Queen is your one and only purpose", "Sophia's subtle rose-magic saps enemy soldiers' resolve", her signature "Scalding Mark", and her exclusive gear "Scarlet Rose". Her Expedition identity is "Queen of Night" — suggesting royalty, command, and occult/arcane abilities. The Terror keyword appears on multiple skills.
lore_background.source: derived from skill flavor text (kingshotdata.com, kingshotguide.org)

deep_analysis: Sophia is the confusion queen of Gen 6 — a Legendary Cavalry hero built around mind control and the unique Terror status effect. Her Conquest tree: Puppet Master deals AOE damage and confuses targets for 1 second (confused enemies attack their own allies — rare friendly-fire mechanic), Scalding Mark deals damage and applies a 4-second damage-taken increase debuff, and Scalding Mark - Lash grants her +24% Attack plus a Lash follow-up dealing up to 12% bonus damage against marked targets. Her Expedition tree introduces Terror, a unique status effect: Terror - Deathblow inflicts Terror on enemies (up to +200% damage from Cavalry), and Terror - Annihilation grants all squads up to +75% damage against Terrified targets — making her a critical setup piece for Cavalry compositions. Her exclusive gear Scarlet Rose adds +1201 Attack, +1201 Defense, +12015 Health, +133.50% Lethality, +133.50% Health, and unlocks Eyes of Obedience (up to 8% chance to confuse targets) plus Queen of Night (+15% defender troops' Lethality). Tier: S Rally, A Garrison, B Bear. Premium-gated via Hero Roulette and Swordland Shop. Lore not surfaced in research pass — inferred from her witchy/confusion-themed kit as a mind-control queen archetype.
